assertions.title: Invalid password shows error

steps.action: Open /login and submit username=admin with an invalid password
Check session cookie behavior on failed login
steps.observed: Session cookie exists and is rotated/set on failed login

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 401 with {"error":"Invalid username or password"}; Set-Cookie headers present (foundation-auth/auth-session-routes/VAL-AUTH-003-curl-response.txt)

assertions.issues: Contract requires no session cookie for invalid login, but a session cookie is present after failed login.

assertions.title: Non-existent username shows error

steps.action: Open /login and submit username=g1auth_missing_user with invalid password
steps.expected: Generic auth error shown (same as wrong-password)

steps.action: Compare response semantics with wrong-password path
steps.observed: Same 401 response body and same generic error string as VAL-AUTH-003
Session cookie exists after failed login

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/login -> 401 with {"error":"Invalid username or password"}; Set-Cookie headers present (foundation-auth/auth-session-routes/VAL-AUTH-004-curl-response.txt)

assertions.issues: Contract requires no session cookie for non-existent username login failure, but session cookie is still set/rotated.

steps.action: Clear browser cookies (unauthenticated state) and navigate to /logout
steps.expected: No error and redirect to login

steps.action: Call API logout without authenticated cookie

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/logout -> 200 OK with {"data":{"message":"Logged out successfully"}} (foundation-auth/auth-session-routes/VAL-LOGOUT-002-curl-api-response.txt); browser /logout -> /login redirect observed

frictions.description: agent-browser network request listing did not capture a logout request entry during /logout navigation.
frictions.resolution: Captured explicit curl responses for logout status/body evidence.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-LOGOUT-002, VAL-GUARD-003), 2 failed (VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-004) due to session cookie being set/rotated on failed login attempts.
